top_signals.title: Iran Sneaks 12 Million Barrels Past Renewed U.S. Oil Blockade
top_signals.summary: Iran is estimated to have sneaked supertankers with a total of 12 million barrels of crude oil in the week between the end of the U.S. waiver on Iranian oil sales on July 7 and July 14, just as the U.S. announced the renewed blockade on Iranian ports and oil cargoes.   Last Tuesday, July 7, Iranian attacks on three commercial vessels in the Strait of Hormuz prompted an immediate U.S. reaction, with the U.S military striking multiple targets in Iran and the Treasury canceling the waiver on Iran’s oil sales that was supposed to be…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Iranian Missiles Hit Two UAE Oil Tankers, One Person Dead
top_signals.summary: One Indian crew member was killed and eight others were wounded when two Emirati oil tankers were struck by Iranian cruise missiles in the Strait of Hormuz, the United Arab Emirates Ministry of Defence said on Tuesday, in the latest escalation in the strategic waterway.The ministry said the tankers…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: China Widens Australian Canola Trade to Include Private Crushers
top_signals.summary: China will allow its private oilseed crushers to buy Australian canola, as the two countries move to normalize a trade that’s largely been halted since the start of the decade.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Federal Reserve Board requests comment on a proposal to amend its requirements for banks to maintain anti-money laundering programs
top_signals.summary: Federal Reserve Board requests comment on a proposal to amend its requirements for banks to maintain anti-money laundering programs
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: South Carolina governor taps Lindsey Graham's sister to serve as interim senator
top_signals.summary: The death of Sen. Lindsey Graham ignited a scramble among South Carolina Republicans to prepare for a special primary election to replace him on the GOP ticket.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Franklin Crypto CIO says crypto prices are disconnected from fundamentals
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Minutes of the Money Market Committee meeting – June 2026
top_signals.summary: The Money Markets Committee is a forum for market participants and authorities to discuss the UK unsecured deposits and funding market and securities lending and repo markets.
